description_long: This is a freestanding blackboard with a dark wooden frame and sturdy rectangular feet for stability. The writing surface is a classic matte black, slightly textured, and appears to be made of slate or a similar material. The frame is thick, with a rich reddish-brown wood grain visible, giving it a traditional and robust appearance. At the bottom of the blackboard, there is a chalk holder or tray, which is integrated into the frame and appears to be made of the same wood, with a small white chalk piece resting on it. The back of the blackboard is solid wood, with no visible openings or additional features. The overall condition of the blackboard is pristine, with no visible scratches, chips, or signs of wear.
description: A freestanding blackboard with a thick, dark wooden frame, sturdy feet, and a matte black writing surface. It features a built-in chalk holder and appears in pristine condition.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full black writing surface, thick wooden frame, and chalk holder with chalk.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the blackboard and the depth of the frame and feet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wooden back panel and the robust construction of the frame and feet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blackboard and the frame's depth.
attribute_frame_design: thick dark wooden frame with rectangular feet and integrated chalk holder
